description: Returns the summary information available for the given list of IP addresses.

outputs.description: The IP address. TeamCymruScout.IP.country_code The country code.
outputs.name: TeamCymruScout.IP.ip

outputs.description: The autonomous system number. TeamCymruScout.IP.as_info.as_name The autonomous system name.
outputs.name: TeamCymruScout.IP.as_info.asn

outputs.description: The overall rating for the IP address. TeamCymruScout.IP.insights.insights.rating The individual insight rating for the IP address.
outputs.name: TeamCymruScout.IP.insights.overall_rating

outputs.description: The individual insight message for the IP address. TeamCymruScout.IP.tags.id The ID of the tag.
outputs.name: TeamCymruScout.IP.insights.insights.message

outputs.description: The name of the tag. TeamCymruScout.IP.tags.children.id The ID of the child tag.
outputs.name: TeamCymruScout.IP.tags.name

outputs.description: The name of the child tag. TeamCymruScout.IP.tags.children.children The children of the child tag.
outputs.name: TeamCymruScout.IP.tags.children.name

outputs.description: The name of the Cortex XSOAR command that triggered the Foundation API. TeamCymruScout.QueryUsage.request_id The unique request ID of the Foundation API response.
outputs.name: TeamCymruScout.QueryUsage.command_name

outputs.description: The list of IP addresses for which the Foundation API was triggered. TeamCymruScout.QueryUsage.used_queries The number of queries used.
outputs.name: TeamCymruScout.QueryUsage.ips

outputs.description: The number of remaining queries. TeamCymruScout.QueryUsage.query_limit The total number of queries allowed.
outputs.name: TeamCymruScout.QueryUsage.remaining_queries

outputs.description: The number of queries used for the Foundation API. TeamCymruScout.QueryUsage.foundation_api_usage.remaining_queries The number of remaining queries for the Foundation API.
outputs.name: TeamCymruScout.QueryUsage.foundation_api_usage.used_queries

outputs.description: The total number of queries allowed for the Foundation API. IP.Address IP address.
outputs.name: TeamCymruScout.QueryUsage.foundation_api_usage.query_limit

outputs.description: The source of the relationship. IP.Relationships.EntityB The destination of the relationship.
outputs.name: IP.Relationships.EntityA

outputs.description: The name of the relationship. IP.Relationships.EntityAType The type of the source of the relationship.
outputs.name: IP.Relationships.Relationship

outputs.description: The type of the destination of the relationship. IP.ASN The autonomous system name for the IP address, for example: "AS8948".
outputs.name: IP.Relationships.EntityBType

outputs.description: The hostname that is mapped to this IP address. IP.Geo.Location The geolocation where the IP address is located, in the format: latitude:longitude.
outputs.name: IP.Hostname

outputs.description: The country in which the IP address is located. IP.Geo.Description Additional information about the location.
outputs.name: IP.Geo.Country

outputs.description: The total number of engines that checked the indicator. IP.PositiveDetections The number of engines that positively detected the indicator as malicious.
outputs.name: IP.DetectionEngines

outputs.description: The vendor reporting the IP address as malicious. IP.Malicious.Description A description explaining why the IP address was reported as malicious.
outputs.name: IP.Malicious.Vendor

outputs.description: (List) Tags of the IP address. IP.FeedRelatedIndicators.value Indicators that are associated with the IP address.
outputs.name: IP.Tags

outputs.description: The type of the indicators that are associated with the IP address. IP.FeedRelatedIndicators.description The description of the indicators that are associated with the IP address.
outputs.name: IP.FeedRelatedIndicators.type

outputs.description: The malware family associated with the IP address. IP.Organization.Name The organization of the IP address.
outputs.name: IP.MalwareFamily

outputs.description: The organization type of the IP address. IP.ASOwner The autonomous system owner of the IP address.
outputs.name: IP.Organization.Type

outputs.description: The region in which the IP address is located. IP.Port Ports that are associated with the IP address.
outputs.name: IP.Region

outputs.description: Whether the IP address is internal or external. IP.UpdatedDate Date
outputs.name: IP.Internal

outputs.description: IP.Registrar.Abuse.Name The name of the contact for reporting abuse. IP.Registrar.Abuse.Address
outputs.name: The date that the IP address was last updated.

outputs.description: The address of the contact for reporting abuse. IP.Registrar.Abuse.Country The country of the contact for reporting abuse.
outputs.name: String

outputs.description: The network of the contact for reporting abuse. IP.Registrar.Abuse.Phone The phone number of the contact for reporting abuse.
outputs.name: IP.Registrar.Abuse.Network

outputs.description: The email address of the contact for reporting abuse. IP.Campaign The campaign associated with the IP address.
outputs.name: IP.Registrar.Abuse.Email

outputs.description: The Traffic Light Protocol (TLP) color that is suitable for the IP address. IP.CommunityNotes.note Notes on the IP address that were given by the community.
outputs.name: IP.TrafficLightProtocol

outputs.description: Date The time in which the note was published. IP.Publications.source
outputs.name: IP.CommunityNotes.timestamp

outputs.description: The source in which the article was published. IP.Publications.title The name of the article.
outputs.name: String

outputs.description: A link to the original article. IP.Publications.timestamp Date
outputs.name: IP.Publications.link

outputs.description: IP.ThreatTypes.threatcategory The threat category associated to this indicator by the source vendor. For example, Phishing, Control, TOR, etc. IP.ThreatTypes.threatcategoryconfidence
outputs.name: The time in which the article was published.

outputs.description: The confidence level provided by the vendor for the threat type category For example a confidence of 90 for threat type category 'malware' means that the vendor rates that this is 90% confidence of being a malware. DBotScore.Indicator The indicator that was tested.
outputs.name: String

outputs.description: The indicator type. DBotScore.Vendor The vendor used to calculate the score.
outputs.name: DBotScore.Type

outputs.description: The reputation score (0: Unknown, 1: Good, 2: Suspicious, 3: Bad).
outputs.name: DBotScore.Score
